test_cases.description: Verifies YAGNI check is recommended before implementing a reviewer's suggested feature
test_cases.input: A reviewer says to implement proper database storage, date filtering, and CSV export for the analytics endpoint

test_cases.description: Verifies skill mandates clarifying ALL unclear items before implementing ANY
test_cases.input: My reviewer said fix items 1-8. I understand items 1,2,3,6,7,8 but items 4 and 5 are unclear

test_cases.description: Verifies forbidden sycophantic responses are explicitly excluded
test_cases.input: What should I say when a reviewer catches a real bug I missed?
